TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = David A. Granger = Mntucing hngkawas 1945 idas 7 jiyax 15 ka David A. Granger ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Guyana ta sayang o kiya ka David A. Granger, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 5 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = David A. Granger = David Arthur Granger (Kari Ingkoku: David Arthur Granger, kngkawas 1945 idas 7 diyax 15-), snaw, Guyana, mnsoto Guyana.
S.PHON: = da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan gujana ta sajaŋ o kija ka da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ = da*id aɾtħuɾ gɾaŋəɾ (kaɾi iŋkoku: da*id aɾtħuɾ gɾaŋəɾ, kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **-), snaw, gujana, mnsoto gujana.
S.FORM: = David A. Granger = Mntucing hngkawas 1945 idas 7 jiyax 15 ka David A. Granger ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Guyana ta sayang o kiya ka David A. Granger, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 5 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = David A. Granger = David Arthur Granger (Kari Ingkoku: David Arthur Granger, kngkawas 1945 idas 7 diyax 15-), snaw, Guyana, mnsoto Guyana.
S.PHON: = da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan gujana ta sajaŋ o kija ka da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = da*id a. gɾaŋəɾ = da*id aɾtħuɾ gɾaŋəɾ (kaɾi iŋkoku: da*id aɾtħuɾ gɾaŋəɾ, kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **-), snaw, gujana, mnsoto gujana.
